# Distinguished Cape

**[STUB]** Source is the Vakuu page and live event text; verify with a dedicated wiki page if one appears.

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Ancient |
| Class | Any |

## Description

Upon pickup, lose 9 Max HP. Add 3 Apparitions to your Deck.

## Notes

### Obtaining Distinguished Cape

Can be offered at the start of Act 3 by Vakuu.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Excellent late defensive package when the deck can tolerate three added Skills; Apparitions cover scripted boss spike turns and exhaust for Feel No Pain/Dark Embrace.
- The max HP loss is usually acceptable when current HP is high and the remaining act has rest access, but avoid if deck needs a very small draw pile or lacks energy to spend 1-cost defense.
